error_signature: Mailjet sandbox setting gets synced across environments
title: Mailjet sandbox setting sync issue across environments
symptom: The Mailjet sandbox setting is unintentionally synced from lab/test to prod environments, causing production to use sandbox mode.
not_this_if: All environments are intended to use the same settings
root_cause: The Mailjet sandbox toggle is stored as a non-sensitive property, which allows it to be synced across environments. This behavior is not consistent with other credentials where sensitive fields are excluded from sync.
fix_steps: Use an HTTP Request node instead of the Mailjet node in test/lab environments.
Point the HTTP Request node to the Mailjet sandbox API endpoint directly.
Set the Mailjet base URL via an environment variable (N8N_VAR_MAILJET_BASE_URL).
agent_instruction: Switch to using an HTTP Request node for Mailjet in non-production environments.
